Contributing to ukbflow

Source: CONTRIBUTING.md

Thanks for your interest in contributing!

Bug reports

Open an issue with a minimal reproducible example:

reprex::reprex()
sessionInfo()
packageVersion("ukbflow")

Feature requests

Open an issue describing the use case and proposed API.

Pull requests

  1. Fork the repo and create a feature branch from main
  2. Make your changes, add tests, update roxygen2 docs
  3. Run devtools::check() — 0 errors, 0 warnings expected
  4. Submit a PR against main

Development setup

devtools::load_all()
devtools::test()
devtools::document()
devtools::check()

Questions

Open an issue or email evanzhou.bio@gmail.com.

On this page

Developed by Yibin Zhou. Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
